definition: Time-normalized AUC/mean of current AV-NPC Euclidean distance over the same conflict-window frames.
first_available_time: per-frame current timestamp; aggregate after conflict-window trace

definition: Time-normalized AUC/mean of inverse current distance, clipped at 0.1 m.
Time-normalized AUC/mean of signed current closing speed -dot(relative_position, relative_velocity)/distance.
Time-normalized AUC/mean of current relative speed magnitude.
Time-normalized AUC/mean of AV speed from backward-difference velocity.
Time-normalized AUC/mean of NPC speed from backward-difference velocity.
Time-normalized AUC/mean of AV acceleration magnitude from backward velocity differences.
Time-normalized AUC/mean of NPC acceleration magnitude from backward velocity differences.
Time-normalized AUC/mean of absolute wrapped heading difference.
Time-normalized AUC/mean of absolute AV-heading longitudinal gap.
Time-normalized AUC/mean of AV-heading lateral gap.
Time-normalized AUC/mean of current TTC risk max(0,(1.5-current_TTC)/1.5).
Time-normalized AUC/mean of current lateral-gap risk max(0,(2-current_gap)/2).
Time-normalized fraction of frames with current distance < 10 m.
Time-normalized fraction of frames with current closing speed > 0.5 m/s.
Duration of the same measured conflict-window support trace; not a future event label.
Number of estimated conflict-window frames contributing to the baseline matrix.
